title: Consistent Copper Bulbs
description: Makes the copper Bulb texture consistent with the new copper torches and lanterns!
body:
## About
Makes the copper bulbs' light more **consistent** with the green light of the copper torches and lanterns of the new **Copper Age update**!

This pack aims to maintain the **vanilla look** and to bring more **consistency** between the different copper items in the game!

## Features
- New consistent texture of the bulb
- Dimming lights
- Vanilla friendly

![All the lit Bulbs + powered versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/174ffa1a259f93dd8c86d7c4886caa77b9bbaf48.png)
